text:
There wasn't much left to do at the small town amusement park. It was summer break, after all.

There had been a long drought and no sprinklers, so no one had been going there much lately. Except for Henry. Henry loved it.

So there he stood, at the entrance, gazing at the empty merry-go-round, the carousel, and the trampoline. That's when he noticed her - Emma. She was there with her family. She turned out to be his crush.

They walked together. They giggled and chatted. He felt so weirdly bold.

Finally, Emma smiled.

"You know, Dad, I've thought about it, and I think I'd fit right in here."

Her eyes sparkled. Henry felt different.

"You'd totally surprise us," she said.

They laughed. He almost forgot he didn't know her.

They spent the rest of the day riding everything together. And Henry talked to Emma almost non-stop. They shared secrets, dreams
